global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with prominent text and call-to-action elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to track their spending with a fast signup process.

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'NovaPay' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A solid green background that fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and fresh look.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Text that reads 'Track every euro' in a large, bold font, centrally positioned for emphasis.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Smaller text below the main message that says 'Fast signup, instant card', providing additional information.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Watch now', designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: Graphic shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes in the center, adding visual interest to the ad.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline text 'Track every euro Fast signup, instant card' is bold and eye-catching, located at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Track every euro Fast signup, instant card

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A small button at the bottom with the text 'Watch now', encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: The logo 'NovaPay' appears at the top left corner, reinforcing brand identity.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, NovaPay logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
